message:
feat(wal-fec): implement fountain-coded WAL recovery with decode proofs (bd-1hi.11)

Add the recovery path for WAL-FEC that identifies damaged commit groups
and attempts RaptorQ fountain-code decode to recover lost frames:

- identify_damaged_commit_group(): locate the FEC group containing
  the first checksum-mismatching frame by correlating WAL salts and
  frame number ranges
- WalFrameCandidate: candidate frame with page data, expected
  checksum, and corruption flag for frame-level triage
- recover_wal_fec_group_with_decoder(): full recovery pipeline that
  collects source + repair symbols, invokes RaptorQ decode when
  sufficient symbols exist, validates decoded payload integrity via
  xxh3 checksums, and produces either a WalFecRecoveredGroup on
  success or a truncation recommendation with WalFecDecodeProof
  on failure
- Re-export all new recovery types and functions from fsqlite-wal
  crate root (WalFecDecodeProof, WalFecRecoveredGroup,
  WalFecRecoveryFallbackReason, WalFecRecoveryOutcome,
  WalFrameCandidate, identify_damaged_commit_group,
  recover_wal_fec_group_with_decoder)

Comprehensive test coverage: group identification, full decode round-
trip, insufficient symbols fallback, salt mismatch rejection, empty
group handling, and decode proof field validation.

Spec reference: bd-1hi.11 (SS3.4.1 WAL-FEC Recovery).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
